title: Running Wild: The Life of Dayton O. Hyde
original_title: Running Wild: One Man's Quest to Save the Wild Mustang
overview: Dayton Hyde’s destiny leads him on a dramatic journey through the West, from rodeos, conservation battles, and wild horse rescues to award-winning books, personal heartbreak and new-found love.
